Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt (confirmed worn during this scene)
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch carried in linen shirt pocket
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Wore formal clothing, a silk hat, and a handkerchief for his visit to the security company.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, and a handkerchief

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.hair_style: straight, reaching down to vest level
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage girl, pale thin face with lustrous skin and sharp brown eyes, black hair reaching to the vest, wearing a tattered inherited veil cap, plain Victorian working-class dress with a self-sewn book bag over her shoulder
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Gifted mechanical aptitude — repaired a malfunctioning pocket watch that professional watchsmiths could not fully fix; deeply practical and emotionally reserved
Melissa Moretti.accessories: veil hat (removes it upon returning home from school), handbag
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Described explicitly with reddish black hair, bright brown eyes, and a delicate, pretty face.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Chapter 6: Zhou Mingrui declares 'You can address me as... The Fool' — confirming The Fool is his chosen identity in the gray fog Tarot world

Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly states he has silver-colored eyes.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black top hat, black knee-length trench coat, Victorian-era period dress
Dunn Smith.unique_identifier: black top hat concealing slightly high hairline; deep gray eyes; black trench coat reaching knees; carries a tobacco pipe

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: Aura colors of red, purple, blue, and white; emotional aura of red and yellow indicating joy, zeal, and excitement.
Justice.source_notes: Aura and emotional colors observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: Innermost Ether Body/Astral Projection is deep blue, akin to the sea and a tidal storm (visible to Spirit Vision).
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Aura and Astral Projection details observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

Wright.primary_clothing: White linen shirt with rolled sleeves, heavy dark brown leather apron, charcoal trousers
Wright.face_description: Broad face, ruddy cheeks, thick eyebrows, strong square jaw
Wright.visual_anchor: Mid-40s stocky male pub owner, wearing a leather apron over a white shirt, broad face with ruddy cheeks and thick eyebrows
Wright.color_palette: leather brown, off-white, ruddy red, charcoal
Wright.source_notes: Referred to as an intoxicated old man with a vague voice behind the bar.

Doug.unique_identifier: wholly black dog with shiny fur
Doug.face_description: fierce canine face with sharp teeth
Doug.visual_anchor: wholly black dog with shiny fur and fierce canine face with sharp teeth, wearing a simple thick leather dog collar
Doug.source_notes: Named black dog used for rat-baiting at the pub.
